subcodes.first_line: O Aminu'l-Asah! The Divine Physician hath pitched His tent in this realm of possibility and hath struck [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امین الاساه ان الطب الالهی قد وضع الخیام فی هذا الفضاء الامکانی و ضرب
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
